title: gh#66: R3.1 — Add @sms/shared/tokens (TokenVault, Credentials)
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/66.
Backlog section: Candidate 3 — TokenVault.

## Context

First PR in Candidate 3 (TokenVault deepening). Closes the cipher-field-leakage boundary identified during the Publisher seam refactor (ADR-0002 is the staged-deferral note that gets superseded by this candidate).

See [BACKLOG.md](../blob/main/BACKLOG.md) → Architectural Deepening → Candidate 3.

## Scope

- Add `packages/shared/src/tokens/types.ts`:
  - `type Credentials = { kind: 'twitter'; ... } | { kind: 'oauth2'; accessToken: string }`
  - `interface SafeProfile` — platform, platformAccountId, linkedinAccountType (NO cipher fields)
  - `interface EncryptedTwitterFields` — 12 cipher fields (4 × ciphertext/iv/authTag)
  - `interface EncryptedOAuth2Field` — { ciphertext, iv, authTag }
- Add `packages/shared/src/tokens/vault.ts`:
  - `interface TokenVault` with six methods (see grilling notes)
  - `createTokenVault(encryptionKey: Buffer): TokenVault` factory
  - Internally dispatches on `profile.platform`; absorbs the duplicated `asHexString` Buffer-vs-string normalizer currently in linkedin-publish / facebook-publish
- Re-export from `@sms/shared/src/index.ts`
- Unit tests covering:
  - `unsealForProfile` dispatches correctly per platform
  - Throws on missing cipher fields
  - Twitter unseal returns all 4 expected plaintext fields
  - OAuth 2.0 unseal returns access token
  - Hex-vs-Buffer cipher field normalization
  - Round-trip seal/unseal for both Twitter and OAuth 2.0
- Add `createFakeTokenVault({ twitter?, oauth2? })` test helper in `packages/shared/src/tokens/__fixtures__/`

## Out of scope

- Switching any callers (R3.2 onward)
- Removing direct `encrypt`/`decrypt` re-exports from index (R3.6 sweep)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- 100% branch coverage on `vault.ts` (security-critical per shared CLAUDE.md standards)
- No existing callers changed

## References

- Supersedes ADR-0002 (deferred TokenVault note) — will mark superseded when R3.5 ships
- Depends on: nothing (first in Candidate 3 series)
